ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type (e.g., bill, resolution, ordinance) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the document was introduced */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the document file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES document_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the action was taken on */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or entity that took the action */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type (e.g., introduced, passed, signed) */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result of the action (e.g., pass, fail, signed) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note about the action */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note or context about the action */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES action_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action detail */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action the detail belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the detail (e.g., vote count, meeting date) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the detail */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the detail */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the detail */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_details_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., bill, resolution, ordinance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the government entity (e.g., City Council, Mayor's Office) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the government entity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the government entity */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the government entity was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the government entity */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the government entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view documents, create documents) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, passed, signed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type (e.g., introduced, passed, signed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., pass, fail, signed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read or not */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task was assigned to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the document file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_comments_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)
